results.one_liner: Waterfall.io provides an API to find and enrich B2B contact and company data from aggregated data vendors with high data quality and coverage.
results.gating_evidence_note: API keys can be created programmatically via API but require a master key; signup page and pricing page missing; usage requires prepaid topping up or monthly invoicing with no free tier clear; onboarding includes talking to team, indicating trial or restricted self-serve.
results.main_blocker: Requires paid usage with onboarding support; not fully open self-serve free but accessible with trial and usage-based pricing.

results.one_liner: Twilio provides a comprehensive cloud communications platform with APIs for messaging, voice, video, email, and customer engagement across multiple channels.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for a free 30-day trial with no credit card required, receive product-specific free usage units, and gain immediate access to API credentials in the console.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Copper is a CRM platform that integrates closely with Google Workspace to streamline contact, lead, and pipeline management.
results.gating_evidence_note: API is available on trial, professional, and business plans; free trial access allows generating API keys by admin users, but API key generation requires admin rights and trial users must be on a paid plan trial.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: GoHighLevel is a comprehensive marketing, sales, and automation CRM platform with a full REST API enabling integration, automation, and custom app development.
results.gating_evidence_note: Free trial accounts have restricted API access and cannot generate or use API keys; API access requires at least the Unlimited paid plan; API key generation is being deprecated, and OAuth 2.0 access requires paid subscription and approval.
results.main_blocker: API access requires paid subscription (Unlimited plan or above), and some rate limits apply; OAuth app creation and Marketplace app approval required for public apps.

results.one_liner: Ecwid provides a REST API platform enabling programmatic access to e-commerce store data, orders, payments, shipping, and storefront customization.
results.gating_evidence_note: Multiple sources including official docs and community FAQs confirm API access requires a paid Ecwid store plan (Venture, Business, or Unlimited). Free plan stores cannot generate or use API keys, though some free plan upgrades are possible on request for development purposes only.
results.main_blocker: API access only available on paid plans, requiring a paid store for normal use

results.one_liner: Higgsfield provides AI-powered cinematic image and video generation with a Python SDK and cloud API for creative and marketing workflows.
results.gating_evidence_note: API keys are obtained via Higgsfield Cloud requiring account signup; documentation and pricing indicate a free tier with limited credits, allowing trial use today.
results.main_blocker: API access requires signing up on cloud.higgsfield.ai and likely subscription to paid or trial plan; no public REST API documented, only an official Python SDK.

results.one_liner: DealCloud is a CRM and deal management platform offering comprehensive REST APIs for integration and automation.
results.gating_evidence_note: API keys require user group permissions set by admins; enabling API key and access is controlled by admin roles indicating that API access likely requires a paid subscription and internal permission management.
results.main_blocker: API access requires admin-set permissions and likely paid subscription; token expiration and refresh required.

results.one_liner: Paygent Connect is an AI agent monetization and billing platform that offers usage- and outcome-based pricing models to track and bill AI-driven work fairly.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developer Portal API access requires filling out an application and approval; no immediate self-serve signup or free/trial API key generation currently visible on public docs or pricing.
results.main_blocker: API access requires application and approval; token expiration every 15 minutes adds minor friction.

results.one_liner: Mailchimp is an integrated marketing platform offering marketing campaign management, transactional emails, and audience management via a robust API.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for a free Mailchimp account today and immediately generate API keys for integration; the free plan includes core features and API access without requiring a paid subscription.
results.main_blocker: Full API access and advanced features require paid subscription; OAuth 2 setup needed for user data access on behalf of others.

results.one_liner: Zoho Cliq is a messaging and collaboration platform with a REST API and developer platform for building bots, commands, and internal tools.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can register applications and obtain OAuth credentials via Zoho API console on a free plan today; Zoho Cliq offers a free plan that includes API access, allowing immediate generation of working API keys.
results.main_blocker: API usage requires OAuth app registration and possibly paid plan for advanced features.

results.one_liner: Clay is a data enrichment and sales intelligence platform that integrates multiple APIs and data sources to build automated workflows and enrich data tables.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access (HTTP API integrations) starts only from Growth plan ($495/mo) and above; free and lower plans do not include HTTP API access despite having free seats and some features; API keys and JWT auth are available but API access is gated behind paid tier.
results.main_blocker: API access requires a paid plan starting at Growth tier ($495/mo), limiting self-serve free access.

results.one_liner: Airtable is a low-code platform enabling collaborative apps with a robust web API to interact with bases and tables.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for free and immediately create personal access tokens (API keys) without requiring a paid plan; free tier exists with API usage limits.
results.main_blocker: API access requires paid plan or onboarding OAuth app setup; legacy API keys are deprecated

results.one_liner: iPayX provides a neutral FX verification layer to audit foreign-exchange transactions, reveal spreads, and quantify FX costs for fintech teams and brokers.
results.gating_evidence_note: No evidence found that API keys or credentials can be generated immediately on a free or trial basis; documentation pages are general and do not show self-serve API key generation or trial access.
results.main_blocker: No public API or developer documentation available, no sign of self-serve developer API access.

results.one_liner: Gumroad is a platform for creators to sell digital products, memberships, and courses with API access for managing products, sales, subscribers, and licenses.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can create a free Gumroad account and generate an API Access Token and OAuth2 credentials by creating an application via user settings under Advanced, without explicit paid plan requirement.
results.main_blocker: API requires API access token or OAuth2 and documentation is somewhat limited, with some endpoints focusing on core sales, products, subscribers, and license management; no official marketplace or extensive endpoint coverage.

results.one_liner: Linear is a fast, developer-focused issue tracking and project management tool with a GraphQL API for building integrations.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can create personal API keys and use OAuth 2.0 authentication; API access is included on the Free plan allowing immediate generation of working API credentials.
results.main_blocker: API access requires at least the Basic paid plan, not available on free tier.

results.one_liner: Zendesk provides a comprehensive customer support platform with APIs for ticketing, messaging, CRM, and more to build integrations and automations.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for a 14-day free trial account immediately at https://www.zendesk.com/register/free-trial/ and obtain OAuth clients and tokens for API use without enterprise partnership requirements.
results.main_blocker: API rate limits and pricing depend on plan tier; higher limits require paid plans with add-ons for scalable AI agent workloads.

results.one_liner: Klaviyo is a powerful email and SMS marketing platform with robust APIs for integrations and data management.
results.gating_evidence_note: Klaviyo offers a free plan allowing access to API keys immediately after signup; API key management available to Owners, Admins, or Managers without paid plan restrictions.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Mermaid CLI is a command-line tool that converts Mermaid diagram definition files into image files such as SVG, PNG, JPG, and PDF.
results.gating_evidence_note: Mermaid CLI is an open-source CLI tool that is installed and run locally with no authentication or API key generation needed, freely available for use.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: GitHub is a web-based platform for version control and collaboration that provides a comprehensive REST API to automate workflows, manage repositories, and integrate with other applications.
results.gating_evidence_note: Anyone can sign up for a free GitHub account and immediately create personal access tokens or OAuth apps to use the REST API; no paid plan required for API keys.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Create accounting tools that help small businesses thrive by integrating with the QuickBooks Online REST and GraphQL APIs.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can register on the Intuit Developer Portal and generate working OAuth 2.0 API credentials immediately at no cost; while premium API features and higher usage tiers require paid plans, basic API access and key generation is free.
results.main_blocker: Pricing now includes usage-based charges for data retrieval API calls and premium APIs require paid tiers and approval.

results.one_liner: Amazon Selling Partner API (SP-API) is a REST-based API enabling sellers and vendors to programmatically access and automate management of orders, shipments, payments, and more.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access requires a Professional selling account ($39.99/month) and an approved developer profile; registration and authorization process is mandatory. No free or trial tier exists to generate working API credentials immediately.
results.main_blocker: Requires Professional seller account and app registration with approval; no free tier for API usage.

results.one_liner: A dedicated API service that extracts and returns YouTube video transcripts in structured JSON or plain text without scraping complexities.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up at transcriptapi.com and immediately receive an API key with 100 free credits to test the API fully before any payment is required.
results.main_blocker: Requires paid subscription for high usage and OAuth2/API key setup with quota limits on official YouTube Data API

results.one_liner: Jira is a project management tool designed for issue tracking and agile project workflows.
results.gating_evidence_note: Free Jira plan allows up to 10 users; API tokens can be generated immediately from https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens without paid plan required.
results.main_blocker: Authentication methods include OAuth and API tokens but require configuration and possible paid plan for full features

results.one_liner: systeme.io is an all-in-one marketing platform offering funnels, email marketing, courses, and affiliate management with a public REST API for programmatic access.
results.gating_evidence_note: API keys can be generated immediately in account settings without payment; free plan includes API access with no credit card required and indefinite usage.
results.main_blocker: Some API endpoints and features may only be fully available on paid plans; free plan is limited to 2,000 contacts and fewer funnels/courses.

results.one_liner: Vercel is a platform to deploy, scale, and manage modern web applications with a REST API for programmatic interaction.
results.gating_evidence_note: Vercel API keys can be created immediately from the dashboard or CLI on a free Hobby plan; free tier users have usage caps but can obtain working credentials without paid subscription.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Intercom is a customer support platform that provides messaging, AI agents, and automation tools to engage and support customers.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access requires creating an app and generating Access Tokens or OAuth tokens via the Developer Hub; a free 14-day trial is available with all features including API access; a paid plan is required after the trial for continued use.
results.main_blocker: Requires paid Intercom workspace for full functionality and API usage; development workspace has limitations and is region-restricted.

results.one_liner: Xero provides cloud-based accounting software with APIs for managing accounting, payroll, and financial data.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for a free Xero account and get immediate access to API credentials and tools without payment; a free Starter tier exists with no monthly fee, enabling API usage with connection limits. Pricing tiers with fees and additional features begin at the Core tier.
results.main_blocker: API usage costs and tiered access with some endpoints gated behind security assessments and paid plans.

results.one_liner: Pumble is a team communication platform offering real-time chat, messaging, and integrations.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access requires installing the API addon within the Pumble workspace and generating API keys. There is a free plan for general usage but to access API keys functionality, the API addon must be installed which is available with a 7-day free trial with no credit card required.
results.main_blocker: API requires an addon installation and generation of API keys within the Pumble workspace; limited to a trial period or paid plan.

results.one_liner: Asana is a work management platform offering a REST API to programmatically create, read, update, and delete project management data.
results.gating_evidence_note: Personal Access Tokens (API keys) can be generated immediately from the Asana developer console by any user on free or paid plans; OAuth apps can also be created without restrictions. Enterprise-only Service Accounts are an additional auth method but not required to get API access.
results.main_blocker: Enterprise-only Service Accounts required for full org-wide data access; some features (e.g., rules) not accessible via API.

results.one_liner: Lark is a unified communication and collaboration platform providing messaging, video conferencing, calendar, docs, and open APIs for integrations.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access can be obtained by registering and creating an app on Lark's developer console for free; core APIs including Authentication, Authorization, Event Subscription, and Contacts are free to use regardless of plan.
results.main_blocker: Some APIs require paid quota packages; onboarding process requires developer registration and app creation.

results.one_liner: Grain provides a platform to capture, transcribe, and manage meeting recordings and notes with AI-powered insights and developer API access.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access requires Starter plan or higher; Personal Access Tokens for API access available only on Starter plan and above; Free plan does not include API access.
results.main_blocker: API access gated by paid plans and role permissions, no sandbox environment.

results.one_liner: FanBasis is an all-in-one platform for running high-ticket digital businesses with payment processing, subscription management, and automation.
results.gating_evidence_note: The official API docs describe direct API key authentication and usage without mentioning paid plan restrictions; FanBasis provides API keys immediately from the dashboard with no sign of gating paid plan or approval required.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Netlify is a programmable hosting platform offering a REST API for managing atomic deploys, sites, DNS, forms, and more with OAuth 2 authentication.
results.gating_evidence_note: Any developer can sign up for a free Netlify account today and generate personal access tokens (PATs) immediately via the dashboard without needing a paid plan, enabling full API access for their account.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Brex is a unified spend platform offering global corporate cards, expense management, reimbursements, travel, bill pay, and a broad REST API for integration and automation.
results.gating_evidence_note: API tokens are generated via the Brex dashboard by an admin after accepting a developer API agreement; this requires being a Brex customer with admin access, indicating that API access is gated behind account setup and approval but can be done through self-serve trial sign-up today.
results.main_blocker: API access requires admin provisioning of tokens and accepting developer agreements; OAuth access for partners requires contacting developer support for credentials.

results.one_liner: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support platform providing a wide range of RESTful APIs for helpdesk operations.
results.gating_evidence_note: Users can sign up for a Freshdesk free plan that lasts 6 months for 1-2 agents with no credit card required and immediately obtain API keys; the API works on the free version as community posts and official docs confirm.
results.main_blocker: API rate limits vary by plan and increased limits require paid subscription or contact with support.

results.one_liner: Pinterest provides a REST API platform that enables developers to build apps for content and ad management on Pinterest.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers receive Trial access upon app approval, which allows exploration and immediate API key usage with limited rate and sandbox restrictions. Upgrading to Standard access with higher limits and production access requires submitting a video demo and manual review.
results.main_blocker: Standard access requires a manual video demo review to unlock production-level access and higher rate limits.

results.one_liner: Zoho CRM is a cloud-based customer relationship management platform with broad RESTful APIs enabling automation, integration, and customization.
results.gating_evidence_note: Zoho CRM offers a free 15-day trial without credit card required, allowing sign-up for free access and OAuth 2.0 API credentials generation. However, API access may still be limited by license type and feature gating to paid plans.
results.main_blocker: API access requires OAuth 2.0 authentication and appropriate user license; some advanced features gated to paid plans or licenses.

results.one_liner: Monday.com provides a GraphQL API platform to automate workflows, manage projects, and integrate with enterprise data.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access via personal V2 API tokens is available to all users with API access, but a free 14-day Pro plan trial is required to explore full API features; after trial users may downgrade to free plan with reduced features.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Discord is a platform for building bots and integrations that operate within Discord servers, enabling messaging, voice chat, social gaming, and more.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for free, create apps, and immediately generate bot tokens or OAuth2 credentials via the Discord Developer Portal without paying or approval.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: DataForSEO provides REST APIs offering SEO data such as SERP results, keyword data, and backlink data for building SEO tools and analysis.
results.gating_evidence_note: API credentials are obtained immediately upon account creation, but API access requires a minimum $50 deposit/pay-as-you-go payment, gating true free or trial use.
results.main_blocker: API access requires minimum $50 deposit and pay-as-you-go pricing, which may introduce cost friction for some users.

results.one_liner: Front is a customer communication platform that provides APIs and tools to build integrations, automate message handling, and manage customer interactions.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can create a free developer account and generate API tokens or OAuth credentials immediately without requiring a paid plan. API tokens can be created by admins in settings, and OAuth is recommended for public integrations. The free 14-day trial for the product includes full features and does not require a credit card, confirming immediate API access.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Threads (Meta) API enables developers and brands to manage Threads presence, publish content, and access insights via an authenticated API.
results.gating_evidence_note: Free to create a Meta app with Threads use case and test with app roles or Threads testers; however, to access the API for users without a role, each permission requires App Review approval and the app must be published.
results.main_blocker: Requires Meta App Review approval and published app status for non-tester user API access; also subject to rate limits and usage caps.

results.one_liner: Cloudflare provides a comprehensive REST API for managing accounts, zones, DNS, organizations and more to control its various cloud and edge services.
results.gating_evidence_note: The Cloudflare documentation and community posts confirm API tokens and keys can be created immediately via the dashboard on the Free plan with no payment required, enabling immediate API access.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Ramp offers a spend management platform with APIs that allow programmatic control over transactions, cards, approvals, and vendor payouts.
results.gating_evidence_note: API key creation requires admin access and is gated behind an application and approval process; sandbox access requires contacting an account manager. No indication that free or trial plans provide immediate API credentials generation.
results.main_blocker: Access to sandbox and production API environments require approval and admin account; not fully self-serve free.

results.one_liner: Telegram is a messaging platform offering Bot, Custom Client, and Gateway APIs enabling developers to build bots, custom clients, and messaging integrations.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can register bots via BotFather and receive a unique token immediately with no payment or approval required, confirming free self-serve API access.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Twenty is an open-source CRM with extensible REST and GraphQL APIs, custom app framework, AI agents, and onboarding support.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for a 30-day free trial on the managed cloud with instant access and create API keys immediately; after the trial, a paid subscription is required for continued API access.
results.main_blocker: API access requires paid plan after free trial; workspace-specific schema means API is dynamically generated per tenant requiring setup.

results.one_liner: ClickUp is a comprehensive productivity platform offering task, document, chat, and AI integrations for streamlined work management.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can generate a personal API token immediately upon signing up for a free ClickUp account; OAuth apps require workspace admin but personal tokens require no paid plan.
results.main_blocker: API rate limits depend on your plan and advanced AI/API features require paid subscription plans

results.one_liner: SE Ranking provides a comprehensive SEO and marketing data API for accessing keyword research, backlinks, domain analysis, and project management data.
results.gating_evidence_note: The API offers a 14-day free trial with 100K API credits and full API & MCP access without requiring a paid subscription; API keys are provided upon email confirmation during the trial.
results.main_blocker: API access requires a paid subscription with credit limits; additional credits may require expensive add-ons or standalone plans.

results.one_liner: Pylon is a customer support platform with AI-native workflows and autonomous AI agents for scalable ticket routing, resolution, and customer health monitoring.
results.gating_evidence_note: API token generation requires an Admin user in the Pylon dashboard; pricing requires a minimum of 3 seats per plan, starting at $100/mo for AI Agents, no free or trial plan allows immediate API key generation.
results.main_blocker: API access requires admin token creation and plan purchase with minimum seats; no free self-serve API key.

results.one_liner: Close is a CRM platform that offers a REST API for automating sales processes, managing leads, and integrating with other systems.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can create API keys via Settings > Developer > API Keys once they have a Close account. Close offers a no-credit-card free trial with API access and calling/AI credits to test, so API credentials can be generated during the trial period today.
results.main_blocker: API access likely requires a paid Close plan after trial; rate limits and some API specs are experimental.

results.one_liner: SendGrid is a cloud-based email delivery service that provides APIs for sending transactional and marketing emails.
results.gating_evidence_note: SendGrid offers a 60-day free trial without credit card requirement, but the permanent free tier has been retired as of May 27, 2025; users can generate API keys immediately during this trial period.
results.main_blocker: API access requires paid subscription after free trial period ends.

results.one_liner: Supabase is an open source backend-as-a-service platform providing Postgres database, authentication, storage, and realtime APIs.
results.gating_evidence_note: Supabase allows anyone to sign up for free and immediately generate working API keys via the dashboard's API Keys section. The free plan includes API access with no requirement for a paid plan.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Coda is a collaborative doc platform that combines documents, spreadsheets, and apps in one workspace and provides a RESTful API for programmatic interaction with docs.
results.gating_evidence_note: Coda API is available free of charge to all users including free plan users. API tokens can be generated and used immediately without requiring a paid plan, though some endpoints require Doc Maker or Admin roles in the workspace.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: LiveAgent is a help desk software and live chat platform enabling customer support across multiple channels with API integration for automation and workflows.
results.gating_evidence_note: LiveAgent offers a 30-day free trial with no credit card required and users can generate API keys within their trial account; API access requires upgrading after trial expiry.
results.main_blocker: API access is tied to paid subscription plans after trial period, limiting fully free self-serve usage.

results.one_liner: WhatsApp Business Platform offers enterprise-grade APIs for messaging and calling to help businesses communicate with customers at scale.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can register and create Meta apps to get temporary access tokens immediately, but full API usage requires a WhatsApp Business account and is usage-based pricing though some messages in the customer service window are free.
results.main_blocker: Requires WhatsApp Business account setup and message-based pricing applies which may limit free usage.

results.one_liner: PitchBook provides a REST API offering real-time access to comprehensive private and public market financial data for companies, deals, investors, and funds.
results.gating_evidence_note: Multiple official PitchBook web pages mention that users must request a free trial or purchase API access; no instant free or trial API key generation is available online; direct sales and account manager involvement are required.
results.main_blocker: Access to API requires purchasing credits and account manager provisioning, not openly self-serve.

results.one_liner: Ahrefs provides SEO and marketing data via a REST API to enable custom integrations and automations for keyword research, backlink analysis, rank tracking, and site auditing.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access requires an eligible paid plan with API units; no free or trial plan allows generation of working API credentials. Free test queries are available only on paid plans, and key creation is restricted to workspace owners/admins on such plans.
results.main_blocker: High pricing and plan tier gating limit accessibility for smaller developers or free access.

results.one_liner: Shopify is a platform that provides APIs and developer tools to build and customize ecommerce stores across multiple surfaces including admin, storefront, and POS.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for a free trial store and generate API credentials immediately; however, continued API usage requires a paid Shopify subscription plan after the trial.
results.main_blocker: API access and usage is gated behind Shopify subscription plans with different pricing tiers and limits.

results.one_liner: Neo4j is a high-performance native graph database with support for Cypher query language and ACID transactions, accessible via REST, HTTP, and Bolt protocols.
results.gating_evidence_note: Neo4j AuraDB offers a free tier with a fully functional graph database that requires no credit card to start; API keys (OAuth 2.0 client credentials) can be created immediately via the Aura console for any user including free tier users.
results.main_blocker: API access requires account setup and paid tiers for advanced managed services, though free community edition allows basic usage.

results.one_liner: MrScraper is an AI-powered web scraping platform that allows users to run custom scrapers via an API for automated data extraction.
results.gating_evidence_note: Free plan offers 100 API tokens per month with no credit card required. Tokens reset monthly and API token generation is immediate with no paid plan required.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Aircall provides a cloud-based business phone system with powerful APIs and webhooks for integration and automation.
results.gating_evidence_note: API keys are generated in company settings which requires a licensed account; Aircall pricing shows API access as part of paid plans with minimum 3 licenses required. No indication that free tier or trial alone grants immediate API key access.
results.main_blocker: API access requires a paid subscription with a minimum of 3 licenses. OAuth app creation requires contacting Aircall for credentials.

results.one_liner: Smartsheet is a collaborative work management platform that enables you to manage sheets, rows, columns, folders, and projects programmatically via its API.
results.gating_evidence_note: Smartsheet offers a free 30-day trial of the Business plan which allows generating API access tokens immediately in the UI under Personal Settings > API Access tab.
results.main_blocker: Requires paid plan for API access and developer account registration is needed for OAuth app registration.

results.one_liner: WooCommerce is an e-commerce platform that integrates with WordPress and provides a REST API to connect stores to external systems and services.
results.gating_evidence_note: Users can create a free WooCommerce store with WordPress and generate REST API keys immediately via WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API with no paid plan required.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Plain provides a customer support platform with powerful APIs, AI workflows, and integrations to manage customer interactions efficiently.
results.gating_evidence_note: Pricing page confirms a 7-day free trial with no credit card required, after which API access requires at least the $35/month Foundation paid plan. API keys and machine users can be created from the dashboard, but API use requires an active paid subscription after trial.
results.main_blocker: API usage requires paid plans starting at $35/month after trial.

results.one_liner: NotebookLM Enterprise is a tool for generating insights and summaries from documents, with APIs for notebook creation, management, and sharing.
results.gating_evidence_note: Google Cloud offers $300 in free credits for new account trials which can be used to access NotebookLM Enterprise API, enabling API key generation and usage on a trial basis.
results.main_blocker: API is restricted to enterprise customers with Google Cloud projects; requires setup and paid plan

results.one_liner: Snowflake is a cloud data platform providing SQL APIs for data access, management, and integration with strong authentication options.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for a free 30-day trial with $400 credit via self-service, requiring only an email; API credentials can be generated and used during the trial but usage consumes credits, after which a paid plan is required.
results.main_blocker: API access requires paid plan after initial trial period; complex auth (key pair or OAuth) may add friction.

results.one_liner: Apify is a cloud platform providing web scraping, automation and data extraction tools via REST API and Actors.
results.gating_evidence_note: Apify offers a free plan with immediate API token availability upon signup without requiring a credit card, enabling free API access with usage limits.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Vonage provides a broad set of communication APIs including SMS, voice, video, 2FA, and more for embedding real-time messaging and communication into apps.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can create a free Vonage account immediately and receive €2 free test credit with demo mode access; API key and secret are available on the dashboard immediately after signup without requiring paid plan activation.
results.main_blocker: API access requires account signup and usage is generally pay-per-use; some advanced features require JWT authentication and paid plan usage.

results.one_liner: Otter AI provides AI-powered transcription and meeting notes with a public API and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration for AI assistants.
results.gating_evidence_note: API key creation is documented and done through the user account but API access is limited to Enterprise customers; no indication that free or trial plans provide immediate API key access; Enterprise plan required.
results.main_blocker: API access requires an Enterprise plan and contacting Otter account manager to enable API; not fully open to all users.

results.one_liner: Harvest is a time tracking and project management tool with a comprehensive API for managing accounts and data.
results.gating_evidence_note: All Harvest accounts including free and trial include API access; Personal Access Tokens can be generated instantly from the Developers section of Harvest ID.
results.main_blocker: API access tied to subscription with limitations based on user roles; free/trial accounts have access but broader usage likely needs paid plan.

results.one_liner: Help Scout is a customer support platform combining shared inbox management, knowledge base, live chat, and APIs for integration and automation.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access requires a paid plan; Free plan includes 5 users, 1 Inbox, 1 Docs site but API keys need permissions not granted on Free plan; trials are for paid tiers and API credential generation requires paid subscription.
results.main_blocker: API access is tied to paid plans only, so requires subscription purchase before use.

results.one_liner: BigCommerce is a commerce platform offering comprehensive REST and GraphQL APIs to build, customize, and scale online stores.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for a free trial store and immediately create store-level and account-level API accounts with OAuth 2.0 credentials. Trial stores provide immediate API access for testing.
results.main_blocker: API access requires store account creation and configuration, and uses OAuth 2.0 with scoped credentials which adds complexity.

results.one_liner: Salesforce is a comprehensive CRM platform offering extensive APIs for integration, customization, and enterprise data management.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for a free Salesforce Developer Edition account which has immediate API access enabling integration and development; no paid plan is required for API credentials generation.
results.main_blocker: API access requires paid plan subscription, limiting fully open self-serve use.

results.one_liner: MongoDB Atlas is a fully-managed cloud database platform providing programmatic access for managing database clusters, projects, and users.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can register for a free MongoDB Atlas account today and immediately create API keys with Organization Owner permissions; API keys and OAuth2-based service accounts can be generated and used starting from a free plan.
results.main_blocker: Requires OAuth2 service account setup with client credentials flow, generally available under trial/paid plans, with some constraints like IP allow listing.

results.one_liner: Fathom provides a public API to access meeting insights including summaries, transcripts, and action items to build custom workflows and integrations.
results.gating_evidence_note: API keys can be generated immediately via the Fathom website settings by anyone with an account. The free tier includes API access with 600 requests per hour included. Paid plans raise the API rate limits and concurrency but free tier API access is open.
results.main_blocker: Some API rate limits restrict heavy usage and higher throughput requires paid plans.

results.one_liner: Firecrawl is an API service for web scraping, crawling, and data extraction that provides structured web data in formats like markdown and JSON.
results.gating_evidence_note: Free tier with 1,000 pages/month credits given automatically; API keys can be generated immediately upon signup without credit card.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Google Ads API allows developers to programmatically manage Google Ads campaigns, retrieve data, and automate ad operations.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developer token must be applied for via Google Ads manager account API Center and requires approval; token levels restrict API access to test or production environments and the approval process may take time.
results.main_blocker: Developer token application and approval is required which may delay access; API usage is associated with paid Google Ads accounts.

results.one_liner: Stripe is an online payment processing platform that provides unified REST APIs for payments, billing, subscriptions, and financial workflows.
results.gating_evidence_note: Anyone can sign up for a Stripe account for free and immediately get test mode API keys to use the full Stripe API sandbox environment; live mode keys become active after account setup but are also available immediately after free signup.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Gorgias is a helpdesk platform designed for e-commerce stores to provide multichannel customer support with API integrations.
results.gating_evidence_note: New sandbox accounts are demo accounts by default; developers must create a draft app and then request manual approval via email to get a developer sandbox account. API keys can be generated immediately within the helpdesk UI after sign up, but the API access requires a trial account that eventually converts to a paid plan. API credentials are available from the settings for owners/admins. The pricing shows a trial is available but no fully free API key generation without trial or paid plan.
results.main_blocker: Developer sandbox account requires manual approval via email and app draft; paid plans required for access beyond trial.

results.one_liner: Salesforce Commerce Cloud is a comprehensive e-commerce platform offering extensive APIs to build and customize headless commerce experiences.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access requires registration involving permissions and is linked to paid Salesforce Commerce Cloud subscriptions; free or trial registrations do not provide immediate API key access.
results.main_blocker: API access requires registration and is tied to paid Salesforce Commerce Cloud subscriptions, limiting free self-serve usage.

results.one_liner: Consensus is an AI-powered research tool that allows users to search and retrieve relevant peer-reviewed academic research papers using an API or integrations.
results.gating_evidence_note: The Consensus API requires application for access with pricing starting at $0.10 per call plus a platform fee. No free or trial API key issuance available; API keys are issued only to paying customers after application approval.
results.main_blocker: API access requires application and paid plan; no immediate free self-serve API key issuance.

results.one_liner: Datadog provides cloud monitoring as a service for infrastructure, applications, logs, and more.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can sign up for a 14-day free trial today and generate API and application keys immediately; however, continued API access requires subscription and billing for usage beyond the trial.
results.main_blocker: API access requires a paid Datadog subscription and billing based on usage; not free tier for API.

results.one_liner: Pipedrive is a CRM platform offering a comprehensive RESTful API for integrating, automating, and extending CRM functionalities.
results.gating_evidence_note: API keys can be generated from user account settings; however, API access requires signing up for at least the free 14-day trial plan, no credit card required.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Bright Data is an enterprise-grade web data platform offering proxy networks, pre-built scrapers, web scraping APIs, web automation, and data feeds to reliably collect and scale public web data.
results.gating_evidence_note: A default API key is created automatically upon account creation with a free plan that includes 5,000 free credits/month; users can generate and manage API keys immediately upon sign-up without requiring a paid plan.
results.main_blocker: API access requires paid plan beyond free credits; some advanced features gated by usage and pricing

results.one_liner: Meta Ads API enables programmatic management and optimization of advertising campaigns across Meta platforms like Facebook and Instagram.
results.gating_evidence_note: Anyone can register a Meta developer app and obtain access tokens immediately via OAuth 2.0 flows and system user tokens for server-to-server use without requiring a paid plan.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Plaid provides financial APIs to connect consumers' bank accounts and retrieve banking, transaction, identity, and other financial data securely.
results.gating_evidence_note: Plaid provides a Trial plan that offers free access to production APIs with limits (e.g., 10 Items), allowing developers to sign up and generate API credentials immediately with limited production use before needing to upgrade; sandbox is fully free for testing.
results.main_blocker: Production API access requires upgrading to paid plans after trial item limits; pricing and product access are usage- and plan-dependent.

results.one_liner: Magento (Adobe Commerce) is a comprehensive eCommerce platform enabling businesses to build, manage, and customize online stores with robust APIs.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access requires an Adobe Commerce license which is paid and tiered by gross merchandise volume starting at approx. $22,000/year; Adobe Developer Console project configuration and license ownership are required to generate API credentials.
results.main_blocker: Requires paid Adobe Commerce license and Adobe Developer Console project setup for API credentials

results.one_liner: Sentry provides application monitoring and error tracking to help developers identify and fix issues in their code.
results.gating_evidence_note: Free Developer Plan available that allows immediate creation of API authentication tokens via user personal tokens or internal integrations; OAuth2 also supported with direct free account signup.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Gladly provides a customer support platform with REST APIs, SDKs, and developer tools to build seamless integrations and customer experiences.
results.gating_evidence_note: API tokens can only be created by users with the API User role in the Gladly platform. Access to create tokens requires permissions likely tied to paid plans, no evidence found of free or trial plan allowing immediate API credential creation.
results.main_blocker: API access is gated and token creation requires appropriate user permissions; no full self-serve free tier found.

results.one_liner: Reducto is an agentic document platform providing production-grade document parsing, classification, extraction, editing, and workflow orchestration APIs for AI teams.
results.gating_evidence_note: API keys can be created immediately by any role within the Studio UI with no upfront payment; a free usage tier provides up to 15K credits before charges apply.
results.main_blocker: API access requires API key with usage credits; free tier limits usage; advanced enterprise features gated by custom pricing and contracts.

results.one_liner: HubSpot is a CRM platform offering marketing, sales, customer service, and CMS features with a comprehensive developer API.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can register and generate API keys and/or OAuth tokens immediately with a free HubSpot account; API access includes a generous daily call limit at no cost; HubSpot docs confirm availability of static auth tokens and private app tokens for integrations without requiring paid subscription.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: LinkedIn Ads API enables scalable ads campaign management, analytics, and audience targeting for businesses on LinkedIn.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers must create a LinkedIn Developer app, apply for Advertising API access in the developer portal, and await review and approval by LinkedIn; no immediate generation of credentials on free or trial plans.
results.main_blocker: Requires application approval and compliance with LinkedIn Marketing API Terms; access is not immediate.

results.one_liner: Podio is a flexible work management platform with a complete API for integrating, automating, and building custom solutions.
results.gating_evidence_note: The Podio API is free to use for both premium and free accounts with full access. Developers can generate API keys immediately after signing up or signing in without requiring a paid plan.
results.main_blocker: API access requires registration and is limited by rate limits; higher capacity needs paid plans and add-ons.

results.one_liner: Sherlock is an open-source username search tool that hunts down social media accounts across numerous networks using an API.
results.gating_evidence_note: Apify platform offers free tier with $500 usage credit for 6 months allowing immediate generation and use of API tokens including for Sherlock API.
results.main_blocker: API access requires account on Apify platform with API token and may have usage limits or paid tiers.

results.one_liner: Attio is a data-driven, highly customizable CRM platform with a full developer platform including REST API, App SDK, and MCP for automation and integrations.
results.gating_evidence_note: API key generation is available on all plans including the free tier; admins can create and manage API keys immediately after signup with no paid plan required; pricing and official docs confirm API access is included in the free tier.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Devin is an AI coding assistant that integrates with developer workflows to automate and enhance software development.
results.gating_evidence_note: API access is only available on the $500/month Team plan and above; the $20/month Core plan does not include API access, only API/secret key provision for integrations but no external API control.
results.main_blocker: API access requires expensive paid plan ($500/month minimum), limiting self-serve ease.

results.one_liner: Slack is a collaboration hub that connects people and apps to streamline communication and work.
results.gating_evidence_note: Slack allows anyone to sign up for a free workspace and create an app with OAuth 2.0 credentials immediately without requiring a paid plan. API keys and tokens can be generated via the developer app setup in a free workspace.
results.main_blocker: none

results.one_liner: Binance is a cryptocurrency exchange platform offering APIs for trading, account management, and market data.
results.gating_evidence_note: Unable to verify current self-serve status due to access blocks requiring JavaScript on key pages and search API usage limits. Previous notes indicate API key requires account activation with deposit and identity verification; unclear if free or trial API keys are immediate.
results.main_blocker: OAuth2 authentication and advanced features require partner status or business approval; some developer docs are JavaScript gated and partially inaccessible.

results.one_liner: Squarespace provides commerce APIs for managing products, orders, inventory, contacts, and more for merchant sites.
results.gating_evidence_note: Based on previous data and known documentation, API keys require a Commerce Advanced paid plan and OAuth client registration requires approval; no evidence found of free or trial immediate API credential generation.
results.main_blocker: API access requires a paid Commerce Advanced plan and OAuth client registration approval.

results.one_liner: Notion is a productivity platform that combines notes, databases, kanban boards, wikis, and calendars, accessible via a powerful REST API for automation and integrations.
results.gating_evidence_note: Developers can create personal access tokens or internal integration tokens immediately on free or trial Notion plans without paid subscription. API access for basic integrations is available instantly. Paid plans required only for advanced AI agent capabilities or extensive workspace features.
results.main_blocker: OAuth public connections require security review for marketplace listing; advanced AI features require paid Notion plan with credits usage.
